original_image_tags: A large, handwritten circle containing the number "3" is stamped in the center bottom portion of the page.

elements.description: Large dark 'RESTRICTED' stamp at the top center of the page.
A large handwritten number '3' inside a circle, located in the lower right section of the page.

judge.reason: Description A describes a stamped number '3' in a circle at the bottom center, while Description B adds a 'RESTRICTED' stamp at the top center not mentioned in A, and relocates the circle/number to the lower right, indicating disagreement on both the presence and location of visual elements.
